title: The location of a parallelogram (sheared figures + dense web)
restrictions: Same located-figures genre as #237 (round 16), reviewed with the user. Chosen angle: VARY FIGURE ORIENTATION / SHEAR — strongly slanted parallelograms at varied angles, so the round is about directional/diagonal energy across the wall (ties to the user's love of directional flow). `locatedFigures` extended with a parallelogram figure type + `shear` + `rotMax` (orientation spread). Applying R16 hard: the LOCATION WEB is the subject — build DENSE (more figures, richer anchor webs, energetic hand); the minimal/light end is dropped entirely ('avoid anything light'). Dense construction lines to the corners are kept (they read structural, not too-symmetric). Monochrome; every line not-straight; density still capped for the paper-rip limit. The 16 span shear strength, orientation spread (unified-diagonal -> scattered), figure count, web richness, and hand energy.
